title: Jesus Shows You the Way to the Highway
original_title: Jesus Shows You the Way to the Highway
overview: CIA agents Palmer and Gagano are tasked with the perilous mission of destroying “The Soviet Union!" As they enter the system using a VR simulation, their mission quickly turns into a delirious trap, far more complex than expected, as the fabric of reality starts unraveling around them.
